videos.title: Death by a Thousand Cuts.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a black/white sacrifice deck, featuring Athreos, God of Passage as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro 
02:28 - Deck Tech
08:19 - vs Liliana, Heretical Healer
23:03 - vs Glarb, Calamity's Augur
34:56 - vs Arixmethes, Slumbering Isle
38:55 - vs Wick, the Whorled Mind
47:03 - vs Yarok, the Desecrated
52:10 - vs The Mycotyrant

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/athreos-god-of-passage-brawl
